metadata.description: The improve-* family — senior-advisor Claude Code skills that audit a codebase and write self-contained plans any agent can execute. Install one, some, or all.

plugins.name: improve-copy
plugins.description: Audit user-facing copy — errors, empty states, labels, microcopy — and write rewrite plans.

plugins.name: improve-prompts
plugins.description: Audit the LLM prompts inside a codebase — system prompts, tool descriptions, examples — and write rewrite plans.

plugins.name: improve-errors
plugins.description: Audit how the app fails — swallowed catches, dead-end errors, missing failure states — and write hardening plans.

plugins.name: improve-analytics
plugins.description: Audit product analytics — funnel coverage, taxonomy, identity, PII, reliability — and write instrumentation plans.
